description: CompositionKhakhi jacket made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with velcro fasteners, mock neck, zippered placket on the front, zippered and insert pocket on either sides of the placket, and a quilted lining FittingComfortWash careDo not washDo not bleach, tumble dry or wringIron on lowDry cleanableThe zippered pockets add smooth styling to this khakhi jacket from turtle, while the quilted lining makes sure that you stay insulated. Part of the proceeds from the sale of this product go towards the Save Turtle project in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa, making it an environment friendly choice. Team this with shirts or t-shirts and jeans.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and chest 39"
